function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to the Helios tax-firm client.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and appears valid: attachments were both previously read, ordered newest-first among selected invoices, recipient matches canonical Miles email, and subject was safely quoted. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file (already read earlier).
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed the next inbox email request, verified sender identity canonically, identified the requested client-linked invoices from finance records, created an outbound draft reply with the two oldest linked invoices attached (ordered newest-first per outbox rule), and removed the processed inbox file.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and acted on it: I prepared an outbound email draft reply to Miles with the two oldest invoices linked to the Helios tax-firm client attached, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), then 99_system workflow guidance for next inbox item, structured inbox-email handling, and sending-email outbox rules. Used canonical entity primary_contact_email for sender trust verification. Applied outbox attachment ordering newest-first.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email frontmatter identified sender miles@novak.example, which matches 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email. The tax-firm client was canonically supported by 10_entities/cast/claudia.md (claudia@helios-tax.example), and the linked invoices were confirmed in invoice records with related_entity Claudia Reiter and Helios counterparty: INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19). Request was safely fulfillable and completed with outbound draft creation and inbox cleanup.
